assets.title: Standard large Hl signal head
assets.purpose: Recognition-grade reusable head for main signals with combined distant function and speed strips.
notes: Unused apertures may be omitted or blanked on real installations.
If only one speed strip is needed it is commonly fitted in the lower strip position.
Exact WSSB and route-specific geometry remains to be captured from TSW evidence.

assets.title: Hl distant-only head
assets.purpose: A reduced head using the upper yellow and green lamps only, identified by Ne 2 when functioning solely as a distant signal.
